title: Update common, image, and storage deps
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | require | patch | `v0.55.1-0.20230713173316-9e5d4a690901` -> `v0.55.2` |
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | require | digest | `6dc2de3` -> `c929d20` |

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>
